meta.title: DEF CON 33 - Tunnelpocalypse - Rich Compton
meta.description: Did you know that you or anyone can launch a spoofed DDoS amplification attack from ANY IP on the Internet? Come find out about this mind blowing vulnerability that may well cause a Tunnelpocalypse!
